parameters.query:
INSERT INTO kb_ingest_state (file_key, file_name, mime_type, etag, size_bytes, status)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, 'processing')
ON CONFLICT (file_key)
DO UPDATE SET
  status           = 'processing',
  etag             = EXCLUDED.etag,
  last_ingested_at = now();

nodes.name: Split In Batches: Loop de Chunks

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO kb_chunks (id, content, metadata, embedding)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb, $4::vector)
ON CONFLICT (id)
DO UPDATE SET
  content    = EXCLUDED.content,
  metadata   = EXCLUDED.metadata,
  embedding  = EXCLUDED.embedding,
  created_at = now();

parameters.text:
=Extraia as informações do documento abaixo e retorne um JSON com esta estrutura exata:
{
  "ship_name": "nome do navio/cruzeiro",
  "theme": "tema do cruzeiro",
  "artist": ["lista de artistas"],
  "embark_port": "porto de embarque",
  "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD ou null",
  "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD ou null",
  "nights": número ou null,
  "price_from": número ou null,
  "highlights": ["lista de destaques"],
  "itinerary": ["lista de portos/destinos"],
  "testimonials": [
    {
      "speaker": "nome",
      "role": "passageiro/artista/organizador",
      "sentiment": "positive/neutral/negative",
      "key_points": ["pontos chave"],
      "quote": "trecho mais relevante do depoimento"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": 0.0 a 1.0
}

DOCUMENTO:
{{ $json.text_sample }}

messageValues.message: =Você é um extrator de dados estruturados. Analise o documento sobre cruzeiros e retorne APENAS um JSON válido com os campos especificados. Se um campo não existir no documento, use null.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO kb_cruzeiros (
  id, ship_name, theme, artist, embark_port,
  start_date, end_date, nights, price_from,
  highlights, itinerary, source_file, confidence, raw_extract
)
VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, 
  ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($4::jsonb)),
  $5,
  NULLIF($6, 'null')::date, -- Se for string 'null', vira NULL real
  NULLIF($7, 'null')::date, -- Se for string 'null', vira NULL real
  NULLIF($8, 'null')::int,
  NULLIF($9, 'null')::numeric,
  ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($10::jsonb)),
  ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($11::jsonb)),
  $12, $13::float, $14::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (id)
DO UPDATE SET
  ship_name   = EXCLUDED.ship_name,
  theme       = EXCLUDED.theme,
  artist      = EXCLUDED.artist,
  highlights  = EXCLUDED.highlights,
  itinerary   = EXCLUDED.itinerary,
  confidence  = EXCLUDED.confidence,
  raw_extract = EXCLUDED.raw_extract;

INSERT INTO kb_depoimentos (id, speaker, role, sentiment, key_points, quote, source_file, cruzeiro_id)
VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4, 
  ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text($5::jsonb)), -- Converte o JSON para Array nativo
  $6, $7, $8
)
ON CONFLICT (id)
DO UPDATE SET
  sentiment  = EXCLUDED.sentiment,
  key_points = EXCLUDED.key_points,
  quote      = EXCLUDED.quote;

INSERT INTO kb_ingest_state (file_key, file_name, mime_type, etag, status, last_ingested_at, chunk_count)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'ok', now(), $5)
ON CONFLICT (file_key)
DO UPDATE SET
  status = 'ok',
  etag = EXCLUDED.etag,
  last_ingested_at = now(),
  chunk_count = EXCLUDED.chunk_count;

  ],
